items.title: This ETF Is Proof That the Healthcare Rebound Is Real
items.description: Track healthcare’s 2026 setup: GLP-1 drug adoption, a valuation gap vs. tech, and why VHT offers broad exposure with low fees and dividends.

items.title: 5 Considerations In The Upcoming CPI Report
items.description: Stock indices rallied despite limited CPI data last month; since then, small-caps and Dow are outperforming tech into early 2026.
